item.title: Any confused androgynous Link enjoyers?
item.dc:creator: Darkwooddale

item.title: Proud Janitor Moment: I removed the hard water buildup from this urinal! COME AND SEE HOW GOOD IT LOOKS
item.description:
Before and after!
The before! The fixture is covered with hard water deposites. Freakin' ew!
I used chemical (foamy q & a) and let it sit for 5 minutes. After letting the foamy sit, most of the hard water spots came off just by wiping them with a paper towel. For the harder spots I had to use a razor blade.
The after! Look how pretty!
item.dc:creator: Lyricalwordsmith

item.title: The true hero in your life
item.dc:creator: GinglaBambino

item.title: Traffic : Be Predictable, Not "Nice"
item.description: This is a classic three way intersection with a single stop sign on the side road. Red and green meet at the intersection, both turning onto the side road. What should happen : Green has the right of way. They take the turn immediately without stopping. Red stops and waits for their turn. Safe, predictable, normal. What happens : Green stops at the intersection. Red stops at the intersection. Both wait. Green signals via headlights for red to go first. This is confusing, slow, and introduces extra potential for collisions. Why this is dangerous : Cars behind green are not expecting them to stop. Red could potentially make the assumption that this will happen next time, but then next time green doesn't stop. Both are confused and go at the same time. A third car at the stop sign won't know what going on and if it's safe to move or not. Be predictable, not "nice".
item.dc:creator: Kavrae

item.title: If you make a nostril sound, you have to hit the green arrow thingy. Friday MEME DUMP (hold on, the weekend is almost here)
item.description:
1. So the story goes that the managament of the company asked the animators to make Chel less sexucal as the first interation was too hot. This is the less hot version:
2. Yall remember the San Andreas dancing missions?
3
4
5. hah
6. RELATE HARD
7. Fuckin men at it at again
8
9. A Good Fallout Meme
10. Murder in broad day light
11. Archery 100
12. That cat look
13. Bro misunderstood the assignment
14
15. And I finally I would like to share a concept I'm making for my indie game - a playable menu. So the idea is that you physically play the Main Menu and you can walk around and select what would be the buttons in a normal menu. There is also a short narrative story up ahead. What do you think about the idea? P.S. If it's not too much trouble please support the game with a wishlist, it would mean the world to me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Memes vol 361 Boobie
item.description:
Imagine falling off
I have a picture of him playing his saxophone in my wallet!!
His cat Big Belly has a ginormous Glock sack
I threw up at a restaurant :( on my plate- while on a date with him. But a week before that he threw up on a ride at the fair so we were even
And big curly hair and huge thighs and facial piercings
We’re 20 so don’t come after us for this one
This is so Dana core
The aforementioned Big Belly tax
Scruffy tax
Froggy and Nessie tax- OH NO I FORGOT LIZA JANE!!
Pickles tax. Happy National Boyfriend day, my sweet boob!! I love you so much!!! @chriscaprisun

item.title: First Day of School and a New Backpack!
item.description: A beautiful bubble snail cruising the ocean floor. These snails have fragile, small shells that often leave parts of their bodies uncovered. Guided by their prominent headshields, they skillfully burrow through the sand, while a silky layer of mucus ensures their seamless glide through the grains. Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/Cs_6IDbL_oP/
item.dc:creator: ChorizoPig

item.title: Images of Note: Let's discuss my salary
item.description:
This seems aggressively American and yet, it's German
Area around York is flat as fuck so you could see those for Miles.
American Universities will have Stadiums the size of Murrayfield meanwhile the biggest university stadium I have seen was tiny.
O-O
HELL YEAH
based
the more you look the worse it gets.
They do this EVEN IF THE FILM IS IN ENGLISH!
don't you love it how moderate is now "supports genocide" and how far left is "doesn't want schoolkids to go hungry"?
(We need more Dad's Army memes)
same but with the UK
Love how free market bros are like "the free market is democratic" when nobody uses AI except for people trying to make a quick buck and companies are trying to make people use it by shoehorning it into everything.
HELL YEAH
https://youtu.be/1kfxm51ZBtc
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
